title: Review the Clone MVP implementation against the approved Decision
objective: Independently review the completed Clone MVP diff against the approved Decision, Assignment path boundaries, security gates, and regression evidence before QA.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify every implementation diff against the approved Decision and each Assignment acceptance criterion.
Verify all changed files remain within allowed paths and no forbidden path changed.
Verify Built-in Demo immutability and separation from myTrips and Offline Cache.
Verify the owner-only member model and rejection of fictional authorization identities.
Verify all recovery claims remain limited to same-device and same-browser behavior.
Verify production Firebase is isolated and the feature flag remains disabled by default.
Verify no Firebase Rules, dependency, package, or migration change exists.
List all blocking and non-blocking findings with file evidence.
Allow QA to proceed only when no blocking finding remains.
